ios._ASC_API_KEY_NOTE: Once App Store Connect app exists, replace ascAppId with the numeric App ID from the URL (e.g. 1234567890). For automated submit, also set EXPO_APPLE_APP_SPECIFIC_PASSWORD or use the App Store Connect API key at ~/.app-store-connect/AuthKey_<KEY_ID>.p8 (key id 5Z29P6C3YN, issuer 41b160e9-71e4-4c24-b04f-a7950f2c2c2c).

android._comment: Place the Play service-account JSON at mobile/play-service-account.json (gitignored), then run: eas submit -p android --profile production. The service account is created in Google Cloud Console for the Play Console app — grant 'Release manager' access in Play Console → Users and permissions.
